steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content:
The student’s notes explicitly state that *Lost in the Shuffle* features two young men 'in the bottom left and upper right corners of the canvas.' This phrasing directly identifies their location within the painting.

All other details (painting size, mood, water color) are secondary or unrelated to the question’s focus on placement.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Choice B restates the exact locations—'bottom left and upper right corners'—directly aligning with the student’s note.

The other three choices either discuss mood (A), painting dimensions (C), or water color (D), which none of them highlight the specific placement of figures.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
